name: 24ad2d75-3cba-4ea9-82ef-822abd218bed
description: Advances the user to the next major phase of the coaching program.

completed_phase.description: The integer number of the Track 1 phase that the user just finished (e.g., 1 for the Grounding phase).

narrative_anchor.description: The user's specific starting point, friction point, or 'why' that they identified to begin this phase.

error.description: Optional. A human-readable message describing what went wrong if the operation failed.

status.description: Indicates the result of the operation. Returns a success string confirming the user was advanced to the next phase.
